name: PROKIDNEY CORP.
business: ProKidney Corp. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing a first-in-class autologous cell therapy, rilparencel, intended to preserve kidney function in patients with advanced chronic kidney disease (CKD) and diabetes. The therapy involves taking a biopsy of the patient's kidney, isolating selected renal cells, and reinjecting them into the patient's kidneys via a minimally invasive procedure.
sellsTo: Patients with advanced CKD (Stage 4 and late Stage 3b) and type 2 diabetes

exposures.sentence: Our lead product candidate, rilparencel, is the only cell therapy in Phase 3 clinical study for the treatment of advanced CKD and type 2 diabetes.

catalysts.event: Topline data readout of surrogate endpoint (eGFR slope) for Phase 3 PROACT 1 trial
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate topline data readout of the surrogate endpoint (eGFR slope) in the second quarter of 2027

catalysts.event: Topline data readout of confirmatory endpoint (composite time-to-event) for Phase 3 PROACT 1 trial
catalysts.sentence: anticipate topline data readout of the confirmatory endpoint (composite time-to-event) in the second half of 2029

tamClaims.claim: Over one million patients are eligible for treatment with rilparencel
tamClaims.sentence: In the United States, it is believed that approximately 3.2 million patients per year suffer from Stage 3b or 4 CKD and over one million of those patients could be eligible for treatment with rilparencel.
